name: Akutagawa is your mentor???? (Atsushi POV)
description:
(Atsushi POV)  Imagine if Akutagawa found the Port Mafia and joined under Kōyō instead of Dazai. Eventually Akutagawa left the Mafia for Gin’s sake after Koyo mended his mind and heart. Akutagwa eventually joins the Agency and on a fateful night, he meets Atsushi, about to starve on the streets. Reminded of his own fate he reaches out to the weretiger and becomes his mentor?! This is the Akutagawa and Dazai swap AU. With the exception that Dazai ends up deflecting but doesn’t join the Agency but rather the government.

Akutagawa's POV: Chat with Atsushi's Mentor (Akutagawa POV)

Art Credits: All Official Art I believe
creator: Doliaa
